Order Instructions

Client Order Instructions:

Client: Easy Street Capital:  (Also orders under National Loan Funding LLC — both have separate accounts. Do not merge or cross-reference orders between entities.)

 

Payment Collection

  • Payment collection via Fastapp payment link
  • invoicing is allowed

 

Fee Schedule (Fastapp Fees with Adjustments)

  • 1004 with 1007: $685
  • 1073 with 1007: $685
  • 1025 with 216: $725

 

Rent Schedules

  • 1007 Rent Schedules must reflect long-term market rents only.
  • Short-Term Rental (STR) analyses are not accepted by this client on the 1007 form.

 

Appraiser Assignment

  • Do not assign an appraiser who has completed an appraisal on the subject property within the past 3 years.

 

UCDP/EAD Submission

  • Not enabled.

Borrower Report Delivery

  • Not enabled.

1.Please update subject property address to : 6316 Palm View Dr., Twentynine Palms, CA 92277 as per uploaded title.

Thank you!
